# Beyond US Borders
> Retirement abroad research for people on fixed incomes, managing health conditions, moving with pets, and relocating alone. Honest, practical, unglamorous.

Beyond US Borders is a static research site — no relocation service, no rankings, no beach photos. It covers the practical questions that actually decide whether retiring abroad works: income portability, Medicare gaps, healthcare access, mobility, pets, hidden costs, and solo female safety. Content is organized into Topics (what you need to know before choosing a destination), Destinations (guides built around specific needs), and Quick Reference (direct answers to common questions, each linking to the full guide).

## Core pages
- [Home](https://beyondusborders.com/)
- [Topics hub](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/)
- [Destinations hub](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/)
- [Country comparison](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/compare/)
- [Quick Reference](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/)
- [Free Tools](https://beyondusborders.com/free-tools/)
- [Services](https://beyondusborders.com/services/)
- [Gear & Essentials](https://beyondusborders.com/gear-essentials/)
- [About](https://beyondusborders.com/about/)
- [Legal](https://beyondusborders.com/legal/)

## Topics
Research and planning guides covering the questions that matter before any destination decision.
- [How to start your research](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/research/)
- [SSDI & Social Security abroad](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/ssdi/)
- [Medicare & healthcare coverage abroad](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/medicare/)
- [Fixed income reality check](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/budget/)
- [Pre-existing conditions & international healthcare](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/pre-existing/)
- [Planning for your future self](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/future-self/)
- [Mobility & daily infrastructure](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/mobility/)
- [Solo female safety abroad](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/solo-safety/)
- [The costs nobody warns you about](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/hidden-costs/)
- [Shipping your car vs starting over](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/vehicles/)
- [Moving abroad with pets](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/pets/)
- [Phone service abroad](https://beyondusborders.com/topics/phone-service/)

## Destinations
Destination guides organized by specific need — not country rankings.
- [Warm & dry climates](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/warm-dry-climates/)
- [Flat & walkable cities](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/flat-walkable-cities/)
- [Fixed income friendly](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/fixed-income/)
- [Progressive illness & chronic conditions](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/progressive-illness/)
- [Solo women](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/solo-women/)
- [Pet-friendly destinations](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/pets/)
- [Healthcare access](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/healthcare-access/)
- [Closest to the US](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/closest-to-us/)
- [Safest countries](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/safest-countries/)
- [Accessible housing](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/accessible-housing/)
- [Dollar economies](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/dollar-economies/)
- [Destinations under stress](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/destinations-under-stress/)
- [Honorable mentions](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/underrated/)
- [Country comparison (22 destinations)](https://beyondusborders.com/destinations/compare/)

## Quick Reference
Direct, concise answers to specific questions, organized by category. Each answer links to the full guide it summarizes — built for fast lookup and AI-assisted search.
- [Quick Reference hub](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/)
- [Money & Income](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/money/)
- [Healthcare & Insurance](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/healthcare/)
- [Mobility & Accessibility](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/mobility/)
- [Safety & Independence](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/safety/)
- [Pets & Relocation](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/pets/)
- [Destinations — By Need](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/destinations-by-need/)
- [Destinations — Country Questions](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/country-questions/)
- [Planning & Logistics](https://beyondusborders.com/quick-reference/planning/)

## Free downloads
- [Free Tools landing page](https://beyondusborders.com/free-tools/)
- [Get the free Starter Kit](https://beyondusborders.com/get-started/) — bundles the Destination Determination Workbook and the Moving Abroad Action Planner behind a single email-only signup

## About this site
Built by Mindy, a woman on a fixed income with a progressive neurological condition, pets, and a serious research habit. Target audience: women 55+ on fixed or limited incomes, with potential mobility considerations, researching international retirement. Content is general research and information only — not financial, legal, medical, tax, or immigration advice. Some links are affiliate links; disclosed on every page.

## OKF Knowledge Bundle
Machine-readable knowledge bundle (Open Knowledge Format v0.1) for AI agents:
- [Bundle root](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/beyondusborders/beyondusborders/main/okf/index.md)
- [Topics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/beyondusborders/beyondusborders/main/okf/topics/index.md)
- [Destinations](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/beyondusborders/beyondusborders/main/okf/destinations/index.md)
- [Quick Reference](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/beyondusborders/beyondusborders/main/okf/quick-reference/index.md)
